archetype: Organic & Earthy (Archetype 1) blended with Luxury (Archetype 5) for a premium, boutique CRM feel.

brand_identity.name: ClientPulse
brand_identity.tone: Warm, human, relationship-first, professional but not sterile.
brand_identity.signature_text: Made by Raj with Love using Emergent

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Mobile-first for on-the-go usage between client visits. Large tap targets (min 48px).

buttons.primary: bg-[#C05746] text-white hover:bg-[#A64738] rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors min-h-[48px] flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#2D2C2A] border border-[#EAE7E1] hover:bg-[#F3F0EB] rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors min-h-[48px] flex items-center justify-center
buttons.ghost: text-[#6C6A65] hover:text-[#2D2C2A] hover:bg-[#F3F0EB] rounded-xl px-4 py-2 transition-colors

cards.default: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-[#EAE7E1] shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(45,44,42,0.04)] overflow-hidden

inputs.text: w-full bg-white border border-[#EAE7E1] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 min-h-[48px] text-base focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#C05746]/20 focus:border-[#C05746] transition-all
inputs.select: w-full bg-white border border-[#EAE7E1] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 min-h-[48px] text-base focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#C05746]/20 focus:border-[#C05746]

badges.stage: inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider

navigation.desktop: fixed inset-y-0 left-0 w-64 bg-[#FAF9F7] border-r border-[#EAE7E1] flex flex-col justify-between py-6
navigation.mobile: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-16 bg-white border-t border-[#EAE7E1] flex items-center justify-around z-50 pb-safe shadow-[0_-4px_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)]

page_layouts.login: Split screen desktop: left side branding with warm sand texture background, right side clean login form. Mobile: full screen warm background, white card for form. JWT flow.
page_layouts.dashboard: Needs Attention Today view. Top: Pipeline value & high-level stats in a horizontal scroll on mobile. Below: Critical action list (overdue follow-ups, overdue payments, tasks due, quiet clients) in a vertical feed. Each item has a 1-tap 'Draft WhatsApp' action.
page_layouts.clients_list: Searchable, filterable list of clients. Visual indicators for 'last contacted' (e.g. green/yellow/red dot). Easy '+' button floating on bottom right for mobile.
page_layouts.client_profile: 'Memory' View. Header with client details & current stage. Body divided into tabs: 'Timeline' (all interactions, payments, stage changes) and 'Tasks/Finances'. Floating action bar at bottom for quick logging (Interaction, Payment, Task).
page_layouts.templates: Library of message templates. Categorized list. Tabs for English and Hindi (Devanagari). Edit view with variable injection (e.g., {{client_name}}, {{stage}}).
page_layouts.analytics: Simple, clean charts. Active clients, MRR, pipeline value. Use Recharts with warm earthy colors matching the palette.
page_layouts.settings: Simple list for stages editing, follow-up threshold (days), and system info. Footer with signature and support email.

interactions_and_motion.golden_rule_trigger: When logging an action, show a subtle slide-up toast or modal offering 'Draft WhatsApp update?'. If accepted, auto-generate wa.me link.
interactions_and_motion.transitions: Page transitions should be swift cross-fades. Buttons should have slight scale-down on active (`active:scale-[0.98]`).

login_background.description: Abstract rippling pattern on desert sand dunes with warm tones. Used for login background or atmospheric headers.

avatar_placeholder.description: Professional consultant headshot. Use for client avatars where real photos aren't uploaded.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Do NOT introduce standard blue, purple, or teal.
Ensure 'Outfit', 'Manrope', and 'Cormorant Garamond' fonts are imported via Google Fonts.
Every actionable item MUST have a data-testid attribute.
Implement the 'Made by Raj with Love using Emergent' footer in Cormorant Garamond italic globally.
Include the support email Sunnykumawat321@gmail.com clearly in the Settings page and global error boundaries.
The 'Needs Attention Today' dashboard is the core feature. Make the action feed highly scannable.
Use Shadcn UI for complex components, but heavily customize to remove the generic 'Vercel' look by applying the rounded-2xl radii and warm border colors.
Ensure mobile bottom navigation uses safe-area padding for modern phones. Desktop uses sidebar.
The auto-draft WhatsApp feature should construct a deep link like: https://wa.me/PHONE?text=ENCODED_MESSAGE
